title: Administer treatments to livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Administer treatments to livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to treat livestock

pcs.text: Confirm treatment requirements according to animal health, veterinary advice or supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm treatment requirements according to animal health, veterinary advice or supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm treatment requirements according to animal health, veterinary advice or supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Select, check and maintain equipment and materials for treatment of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and maintain equipment and materials for treatment of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and maintain equipment and materials for treatment of livestock.

pcs.text: Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare livestock treatment site and facilities.

pcs.text: Prepare livestock treatments and calibrate equipment as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare livestock treatments and calibrate equipment as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare livestock treatments and calibrate equipment as required.

elements.title: Treat livestock

pcs.text: Identify livestock for treatment according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify livestock for treatment according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify livestock for treatment according to workplace requirements and animal welfare practices.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move livestock to holding area or yard facility where applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move livestock to holding area or yard facility where applicable.

pcs.text: Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Calculate dose rates according to product label directions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate dose rates according to product label directions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate dose rates according to product label directions.

pcs.text: Administer treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Administer treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Administer treatments.

pcs.text: Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with administering treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with administering treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and minimise environmental impacts associated with administering treatments.

pcs.text: Follow workplace procedures to minimise risk of resistance to veterinary medicines and chemicals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow workplace procedures to minimise risk of resistance to veterinary medicines and chemicals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow workplace procedures to minimise risk of resistance to veterinary medicines and chemicals.

pcs.text: Prepare and move livestock along a planned route

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain facilities using appropriate hygiene procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return materials and unused treatments to store or dispose of according to workplace environment and biosecurity policies and procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices.
